_comment: MCP server configuration for the Agentic AI Data Management system. This file documents the two MCP servers used as the integration layer between agents and external tools. The orchestrator (orchestrator/graph.py) reads equivalent settings at runtime via environment variables and config.py.

duckdb.description: Read-only DuckDB data warehouse access. Exposes: duckdb_list_tables, duckdb_describe_table, duckdb_query (SELECT only), duckdb_get_table_sample.

dbt.description: dbt CLI command execution. Exposes: dbt_run, dbt_test, dbt_docs_generate, dbt_ls.
